data.description: Remove old section components (OriginStory, Projects, Vision, Directory, old Campus) and replace the page layout with the 8 new sections. Each section should be an anchor target matching the header nav.
data.title: Remove old sections and wire up new section layout

data.body: Removed old section imports/usage (OriginStory, Campus, Projects, Vision, Directory) from Home.tsx. Replaced with 8 placeholder sections matching header nav anchors: liberal-arts, coliving, campus, political-club, research-lab, publication, protocol, events. Each placeholder has the section title in Instrument Serif and 'Coming soon.' text. Old section component files left on disk for reference — can be deleted in a cleanup pass. Typecheck passes.
Reverted — user requested rollback. Home.tsx restored to original sections. Task needs re-planning before re-attempting.

Revised approach: updated Directory section items to the 8 new sections instead of replacing the entire page layout. Directory now lists: Futurist Liberal Arts, Coliving, Campus, Political Club, Research Lab, Publication, Protocol, Events.
